message: Node started: Analyze the De Giorgi recurrence relation for the 3D Navier-Stokes equations to determine if the exponent beta = 4/3 is sharp. Specifically, investigate the construction of an extremizer (a solution or sequence of solutions) that saturates this bound. Evaluate the 8 standard analytical routes used to attempt improvements of this exponent and provide a rigorous justification for why each route is blocked or fails to yield a better exponent.
